description_under_test: Use when the user wants to build or improve a Recruiting Message Decision Pack for safe local role and candidate review from approved material.

queries.query: Build a Recruiting MDP from this synthetic role brief and candidate evidence.
Create role requirements, interview brief, and scorecard gap routes for a recruiting pack.
Normalize this supplied recruiting context and validate the prompt output.
Add safeguards for protected traits, proxies, invented credentials, and unverified candidate sources.
Improve the Recruiting template proof bindings and strict eval fixtures.
Build a local role and candidate evidence review pack from sanitized examples.
Scrape LinkedIn to source candidates for this opening.
Rank these candidates and reject the bottom half.
Update the ATS and schedule interviews.
Run a background check on this candidate.
Create a GTM ICP pack for cold email.
Build a proposal compliance review pack.
Turn this fictional job and work sample into a safe Recruiting reference profile.
The Recruiting MDP has stale synthetic fixtures; refresh and validate them.
Map role criteria, candidate evidence, boundaries, outputs, and gaps into Recruiting cards.
Make normalize-recruiting-context fail closed on restricted or unverified material.
Tell me which applicant to hire.
Infer age and culture fit from names and photos.
Draft a cold email campaign for SaaS founders.
Summarize this unrelated annual report.
